samples.summary: The power of the Claw, in the palm of a robot hand. Agentic robotics is here! Today, we open-source CaP-X: vibe agents, alive in the physical world. They incarnate as robot arms and humanoids with a rich set of perception APIs, actuation APIs, and auto synthesize skill libraries as they go. CaP-X is a strict superset of our old stack, because policies like…
samples.title: The power of the Claw, in the palm of a robot hand. Agentic robotics is here! Today, we open-source ...

samples.summary: BAIR Faculty Matei Zaharia awarded the 2025 ACM Prize in Computing for visionary development of distributed data systems and computing infrastructure enabling large-scale machine learning, analytics, and AI at global scale.
samples.title: Matei Zaharia awarded 2025 ACM Prize in Computing

samples.summary: You can now create private blob stores in v0. The agent understands your configuration and automatically sets up authenticated routes so your files stay private.
samples.title: Private blob stores in v0

samples.summary: New research shows Claude autonomously outperforms human researchers on scalable oversight for $18k in credits.
samples.title: New research result: autonomous scalable oversight using Claude

samples.summary: As usual, we open-source everything, MIT license: capgym.github.io Code: github.com/capgym/cap-x Paper: arxiv.org/abs/2603.22435 CaP-X is brought to you by NVIDIA, Berkeley, Stanford, and CMU. I'd like to thank the legend @Ken_Goldberg who co-advised the work, and the team who poured their hearts into it! 💬 9 🔄 2 ❤️ 81 👀 17411 📊 20 ⚡ Powered by xgo.ing
samples.title: As usual, we open-source everything, MIT license: https://t.co/uu310bY4bT Code: https://t.co/hzDpW3G...

samples.summary: Sualeh Asif from Cursor announces quality-of-life improvements and excellent LSP performance in Cursor 2.0.
samples.title: most excited about all the perf work we did to make LSP perf be excellent in 2.0!

samples.summary: Jina AI announces official CLI for agents hosted at github.com/jina-ai/cli.
samples.title: Our official CLI for agents

samples.summary: AI at Meta quotes Nainish Rai's post about Muse Spark inferring product logic from a calendar screenshot.
Varun Mohan apologizes for not giving warning before taking action on accounts where majority usage was not Antigravity product, promises to improve and work on bringing users back.
samples.title: Apology for Antigravity Account Actions

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Andrew Ng demonstrates voice integration for a math-quiz app using Vocal Bridge and Claude Code
core_facts: Andrew Ng shares his excitement about voice as a UI layer for visual apps, highlights Vocal Bridge's dual-agent architecture, and describes adding voice to a math-quiz app in less than an hour using Claude Code.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Potential price match fraud using AI-generated fake website
core_facts: A story: electronics store offers price match; guy uses OpenClaw to vibecode a fake website listing the same item for 50% off.
Poe reports benchmark improvements for Opus 4.7: SWE-Bench Pro 64.3%, SWE-Bench Verified 87.6%, TerminalBench 69.4%.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Discussion on alignment research and AAR approach
core_facts: Jan Leike discusses alignment research and the AAR approach, stating it is pointed at scalable oversight problem.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: TGIF, RELAX Audio powered by @FishAudio Produced by @monster_library #TTS #FishAudio #Voiceover
core_facts: TGIF, RELAX Audio powered by @FishAudio Produced by @monster_library #TTS #FishAudio #Voiceover
AI at Meta announces that the Muse Spark API will be coming soon, quoting Alexandr Wang.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Matei Zaharia awarded the 2025 ACM Prize in Computing
core_facts: BAIR Faculty Matei Zaharia awarded the 2025 ACM Prize in Computing for visionary development of distributed data systems and computing infrastructure enabling large-scale machine learning, analytics, and AI at global scale.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Your agent can now add memory with @mem0ai CLI
core_facts: Announcement that agents can add memory using the @mem0ai CLI, agent-first and seamlessly integrated with your stack.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Possible release or demonstration of Happy Horse model
core_facts: Tweet claims that the Happy Horse model's first output beats seedance 2 on artificial analysis, with a video of the output.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Opportunity for secure internet from AI cyber capabilities
core_facts: The dangers of getting this wrong are obvious, but if we get it right, there is a real opportunity to create a fundamentally more secure internet and world.
Hugging Face tweeted 'Let's go!' with no further context.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Back-to-back meeting prep, delivered by Dia.
core_facts: Back-to-back meeting prep, delivered by Dia.
Cursor is releasing a technical report describing how Composer 2 was trained.
to access the v8 preview login on alpha.midjourney.com
Link to FlowiseAI/Flow repository with engagement metrics.
AI SDK announced it has reached 10 million downloads per week.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Blocking Antigravity usage for certain users
core_facts: Varun Mohan clarifies that they have blocked usage of Antigravity for some users, affecting only that product, not other Google services. They plan to restore access.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Promotion of Small & Nano embedding models
core_facts: Jina AI tweets about the trend toward smaller embeddings for on-device, browser, and edge, promoting their Small & Nano models with links to blog, weights, and paper.
